name: Maria G.
testimonial:
Daniel is a great handyman and very easy to work with. His communication is excellent and he is always responsive and reliable. He is thoughtful about problem solving and pays close attention to detail. I really appreciate that he offers multiple solutions and is not always trying to upsell. He will explain options, including things I could do myself, which builds a lot of trust. 
He has power washed and re-stained my decks, completed a variety of small interior jobs, and helped build a walkway entrance that also provides support to a stone wall that was not properly supported before I bought the house. The work looks good and was done carefully and intentionally. I trust his recommendations and would absolutely hire him again.

name: Jaclyn S.
testimonial:
Daniel has been an amazing handyman and resource for so many of the things we needed to fix in our home and our rental property. We were able to quickly show him the issue and leave him to it. His prices are reasonable, he's trustworthy and kind, and we always knew he would do an impeccable job.

Just look below at the list of things he helped us with. He can do anything! We highly recommend Daniel for all of your handyman needs!

- pressure wash exterior, deck, patio, and walkway
- stain deck and patio
- replace bedroom door
- paint over accent wall
- caulk, touch up paint and other minor repairs to make ready for a new tenant.
- install decals
- frame and hang artwork
- repair and paint drywall on hallway ceiling after water leak.
- repair and re-stain fence
- repaint entry door and metal handrails
- install mirrors
- repair drywall texture and paint extra bedroom
- repair rooftop deck
- other minor improvements and routine maintenance as needed.

Can't thank you enough Daniel for all of your help!!!!🙏❤️

name: Jeff M.
testimonial: Daniel is fantastic. We hired him to do a minor bathroom remodel.  It was affordable, he was honest and transparent, and we couldn’t be happier with the work. We will definitely be asking for his help on future home projects.

name: Monica L.
testimonial: Daniel did a fantastic job on our deck repair and door screen projects. He replaced several posts and rails on our deck that had some unique challenges as well as replaced the ripped screens on our back patio doors. We are really happy with the result. He was also super reliable - great communication and consistent follow through, something especially valued in a handyman. Hoping to hire him again for a multitude of projects!
